description: Enhance the shared design system (packages/shared-ui/) with production-grade components: expanded theme system with CSS variables and design tokens, layout components (AppShell, Sidebar, PageContainer), form components (FormField, SearchInput, FileUpload, TextArea, Select, Dialog), and voice/media input components (VoiceInput). Ensure all components follow the existing pattern of React.FC with exported TypeScript props interfaces and Tailwind CSS, with proper accessibility attributes.
steps: 1. Update packages/shared-ui/package.json to add dependencies: react, react-dom, @types/react (as peerDeps/devDeps), tailwindcss, and class-variance-authority for component variants.
2. Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/Layout/AppShell.tsx - Main app shell with sidebar + content area. Props: children, sidebar, topBar, theme. Follow Button.tsx pattern.
3. Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/Layout/Sidebar.tsx - Collapsible sidebar with nav items, user profile area. Props: items, collapsed, onToggle, header, footer.
4. Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/Layout/PageContainer.tsx - Content wrapper with max-width, padding, breadcrumbs. Props: children, title, breadcrumbs, actions.
5. Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/Layout/index.ts barrel exporting all layout components.
6. Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/Form/FormField.tsx - Label + input + error message wrapper. Props: label, error, hint, required, children.
7. Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/Form/TextArea.tsx - Multi-line text input. Props: value, onChange, placeholder, rows, maxLength, resize, disabled.
8. Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/Form/Select.tsx - Dropdown select. Props: options, value, onChange, placeholder, multiple, searchable.
9. Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/Form/SearchInput.tsx - Search with debounce, clear button, loading state. Props: value, onChange, placeholder, debounceMs, loading.
10. Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/Form/FileUpload.tsx - Drag-and-drop file upload. Props: accept, maxSize, multiple, onUpload, onError.
11. Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/Form/index.ts barrel exporting all form components.
12. Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/Dialog.tsx - Accessible modal dialog with trap focus. Props: open, onClose, title, children, size.
13. Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/Skeleton.tsx - Skeleton loader placeholder. Props: variant (text, circle, rect), width, height, animate.
14. Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/VoiceInput.tsx - Voice recording button with waveform visualization. Props: onTranscript, onRecordingStart, onRecordingStop, isRecording, className.
15. Create packages/shared-ui/src/themes/tokens.ts - Design tokens as CSS variables map: colors, spacing, typography, shadows, transitions for dark/light/neon modes.
16. Create packages/shared-ui/src/themes/index.ts barrel exporting all themes and tokens.
17. Update packages/shared-ui/src/index.ts to export all new components (Layout/*, Form/*, Dialog, Skeleton, VoiceInput) and tokens.
18. Create packages/shared-ui/src/__tests__/components.test.tsx testing rendering and props for Button, Dialog, Skeleton, FormField, AppShell, VoiceInput. Use vitest with @testing-library/react.
19. Update packages/shared-ui/package.json scripts to include test: vitest run.
acceptance_criteria: All new components export correct TypeScript interfaces
Every interactive component has aria-label or aria-labelledby attributes
Component tests pass with vitest run in packages/shared-ui
All components use Tailwind CSS utility classes (no raw CSS files)
